question_en: What was the total phosphate production in Saudi Arabia in 2022?
question_ar: ما هو إجمالي إنتاج الفوسفات في المملكة العربية السعودية في عام 2022؟
sql: SELECT SUM(ap.production_value_base) as total_production FROM arab_production ap JOIN countries c ON ap.country_id = c.id JOIN mineral_production mp ON ap.mineral_production_id = mp.id WHERE c.name_en = 'Saudi Arabia' AND mp.mineral_name_en = 'Phosphate' AND ap.year = 2022

question_en: Compare copper exports between UAE and Egypt in 2023
question_ar: قارن صادرات النحاس بين الإمارات ومصر في عام 2023
sql: SELECT c.name_en, SUM(tw.value_usd) as total_exports FROM trade_world tw JOIN countries c ON tw.reporter_country_id = c.id JOIN mineral_trade mt ON tw.mineral_trade_id = mt.id WHERE mt.mineral_name_en = 'Copper' AND tw.type_trade = 'exports' AND tw.year = 2023 AND c.name_en IN ('United Arab Emirates', 'Egypt') GROUP BY c.name_en ORDER BY total_exports DESC

question_en: Which Arab country has the highest mineral production diversity?
question_ar: أي دولة عربية لديها أعلى تنوع الإنتاج المعدني؟
sql: SELECT c.name_en, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.mineral_production_id) as mineral_count FROM arab_production ap JOIN countries c ON ap.country_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name_en ORDER BY mineral_count DESC LIMIT 1

question_en: What is the trend of gold production in Arab countries over the last 5 years?
question_ar: ما هو اتجاه إنتاج الذهب في الدول العربية على مدى السنوات الخمس الماضية؟
sql: SELECT ap.year, SUM(ap.production_value_base) as total_gold_production FROM arab_production ap JOIN mineral_production mp ON ap.mineral_production_id = mp.id WHERE mp.mineral_name_en = 'Gold' AND ap.year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 5 GROUP BY ap.year ORDER BY ap.year DESC

question_en: List the top 5 trade partners for Iraq in 2023
question_ar: اسرد أفضل 5 شركاء تجاريين للعراق في عام 2023
sql: SELECT tp.name_en, SUM(pt.value_usd) as total_trade FROM partner_trade pt JOIN countries c ON pt.reporter_country_id = c.id JOIN trade_partners tp ON pt.partner_id = tp.id WHERE c.name_en = 'Iraq' AND pt.year = 2023 GROUP BY tp.name_en ORDER BY total_trade DESC LIMIT 5
